argument: The contested claim asserts that the ECC project has 35,236 forks on GitHub [team-03]. However, this figure is self-reported by the project founder and sourced directly from their repository. Given that the data is not verified by an independent third party or corroborated by alternative sources, it raises concerns regarding its accuracy. Furthermore, negative-result searches reveal no engagement from notable developers or the broader community, casting doubt on the legitimacy of such a high fork count. Even if we consider the claim to be accurate as stated, it may stem from an unannounced feature or promotional tactic rather than genuine community interest, further undermining the credibility of the claim.
